name: Spotlight
scaffolding_intent: Isolates a character or object by darkening the scene and adding a luminous halo, prompting the child to identify and name it

parameters.name: dimStrength
parameters.description: How much non-target pixels are dimmed

parameters.name: haloColor
parameters.description: Color of the halo around entity

correction_intent: Child CONFUSED TWO DIFFERENT ENTITIES or referred to a completely wrong entity (e.g. said 'rabbit' when it's actually a 'dog', said 'bedroom' when it's a 'kitchen', described a cat when there is no cat in the scene). I1 is for when the child points to the WRONG entity entirely — NOT for when they use the wrong name/role/profession for the correct entity (use I2 Nametag for that). The target should be the CORRECT entity in the scene that was misidentified, or 'scene'.
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't mentioned an entity or a setting present in the scene
